name: 5'x7' Textured Knitted Area Rug Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Revamp the look and feel of any room with this Textured Knitted Area Rug from Threshold™. This knitted area rug showcases a timeless textured pattern in an ivory hue to liven up the look of your space. Easy to clean, this rectangular medium-pile rug offers soft comfort underfoot.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
